add.reason: Missing null check for product.price before rendering
API endpoint hardcoded without environment variable
add.recommendation: Move API_BASE_URL to .env file and use process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL

add.reason: Email validation regex is too permissive

modify.reason: Cart total calculation doesn't handle floating point precision
modify.recommendation: Use: const total = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0).toFixed(2)

modify.reason: Token stored in localStorage without encryption
modify.recommendation: Implement secure token storage using httpOnly cookies or encrypt before storing

delete.reason: File contains deprecated utility functions no longer in use
delete.recommendation: Remove file and update imports in dependent files
